run_summary.summary: Busy Wednesday! SOJOS content was submitted to Ruby this morning — video + caption are in Google Drive and we're waiting on approval. Aleve still needs urgent attention: brand flagged the VO back on Apr 13 (missed until yesterday) — it didn't follow the approved script and all disclosures are missing. Liz said she'd redo it today, so hopefully that's already in progress. JLab payment is overdue — others on the same campaign pulse were paid two weeks ago; management is escalating with JLab accounting and should hear back tomorrow. Big Flexsteel news: the Popfly platform issue is fully resolved, campaign is confirmed 'in progress' on Liz's dashboard, and there's a Steinhafels retail store visit TOMORROW (Thu Apr 23, 11:30am–12pm) for filming — don't miss it! Two new PDM opportunities: Gaia Herbs is a real cash offer ($1K–$5K, May–June, 1 Reel + Stories) that fits Liz's wellness angle, and Outdoorsy is a trade deal for an RV rental in exchange for content — no cash but could be a fun family trip.

suggestions.message: Store visit is TOMORROW — Thu Apr 23 between 11:30am–12pm at the Steinhafels retail location. Ian at Popfly has been notified. Campaign is confirmed active. Don't be late! 🏠

Liz said she'd redo the VO today (Apr 22) — check that it's been resubmitted with the correct script and #AlevePartner disclosure for the first 5 seconds. Approved script: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Y9GTFoO9pVS5c9oarq00onyFvIv_hXb4/
Payment is overdue — others on the same Pulse campaign were paid ~2 weeks ago. Management is escalating with JLab accounting. Follow up tomorrow (Apr 23) if no word. 💸

PDM firm offer: $1K–$5K for 1x IG Reel (45–60 sec, collab post) + 1x IG Story (3 frames) + 1x Reminder Frame. May–June 2026. Wellness/holistic niche is a good fit for Liz. Must apply via PDM Google Form using PDM email: https://forms.gle/GeRkt5hpW5HB1fTj8 — deadline is tight, decide ASAP! 🌿

PDM trade deal: free RV rental + concierge booking in exchange for content sharing the trip experience. No cash, but could be a great family adventure. Apply via PDM Google Form if interested: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfDd3E8vvrXrgrvOaPRVMecI-x_px4vVWyTioYvErmTct9zIQ/viewform 🚐

deals.next_action: Decide whether to apply for Gaia Herbs campaign via PDM Google Form
deals.notes: [Apr 22]: PDM firm offer — Gaia Herbs. Budget: $1,000–$5,000. Deliverables: 1x IG Reel (45–60 sec, collab post), 1x IG Story (3 frames), 1x IG Story Reminder Frame. Usage: link in bio 30 days + organic/paid whitelisting 30 days. Exclusivity: no competing herbal/supplement products 1 week before/during/after. Timeline: May–June 2026. Target: wellness/holistic/low-tox creators. Note: must apply via PDM Google Form (https://forms.gle/GeRkt5hpW5HB1fTj8) using PDM email address — non-PDM email will not be shortlisted. Sent to full PDM roster, not a direct offer.
